_comment: Alchemist-surfaced suggestions catalog — cross-backend tool combos and pre-written /cast prompts, grouped by all six focus profiles from focus-profiles.json. A combo's `chain` lists namespaced `serverId/toolName` tools in execution order; the alchemist's value is in combos spanning >1 backend. `verified:true` means EVERY tool in the chain was confirmed on a connected server at the time that specific combo was written/verified; connectivity changes since then are noted in per-combo notes. `verified:false` means the chain references at least one config-present-but-not-connected server. Prompts are pre-written natural-language intents a user can fire via ch1tty/cast; `resolves_to` names the combo (or a single tool) the cast should land on. This is a data artifact only — no loader, no public tool beyond the existing 5. Updated 2026-05-30 to add code, communication, and ops focus profiles (PRs #71, #72, #80). Updated 2026-06-03 to add Linear MCP (linear) to code and governance profiles. Updated 2026-06-04: re-enumerated connected server set. Updated 2026-06-05: notion reconnected; fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs; fixed fs/directory_tree → fs/list_directory; 13 combos newly verified:true (31/65 total verified).

generatedFrom.connectedServerNote: 2026-06-05 fourth-pass re-enumeration via live cast probes: notion reconnected (API-post-page, API-post-search, API-retrieve-a-page, API-patch-block-children, API-create-a-comment, API-patch-page confirmed). Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs across all combos (real tool is query-docs). Fixed fs/directory_tree → fs/list_directory (real tool name). 13 combos newly verified:true using confirmed-live backends.

finance.description: Billing, payments, and financial ecosystem tools — now extended with the append-only ChittyLedger (ledger-mcp) and ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp) for immutable audit trails and billing workflow tracking. NOTE: stripe, tasks, and ledger backends were NOT connected on the live gateway at generation time — combos involving them are verified:false. Stripe tool names follow the @stripe/mcp surface and are plausible but unverified.

combos.name: invoice-to-ledger-tracker
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and write each into a Notion finance tracker database as a page — turning billing state into a queryable, human-readable ledger view.
combos.notes: stripe not connected (lazy); stripe/list_invoices inferred from @stripe/mcp surface. notion/API-post-page is verified.

combos.name: new-customer-onboarding-record
combos.accomplishes: Create a Stripe customer, log the customer record into Notion, and open a GitHub issue to track onboarding follow-up work — a three-backend chain spanning payments, docs, and engineering.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). notion/API-post-page verified. github not connected (2026-06-04).

combos.name: payment-failure-triage
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate failed/pending Stripe payment intents, reason over likely causes and remediation order with sequential-thinking, then record the triage plan as a Notion page.
combos.notes: stripe inferred. thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: invoice-to-immutable-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and append each as an immutable entry to the ChittyLedger — creating an auditable, append-only financial record that cannot be altered after the fact.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp — in config (enabled:false). This is the core finance-immutability combo: Stripe is the source of truth for billing; the ledger is the durable audit anchor.

combos.name: billing-task-and-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Create a billing remediation task in ChittyAgent Tasks and simultaneously append a ledger entry recording the intent — so the task's existence is anchored in the immutable ledger before it can be lost or modified.
combos.notes: tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). Both are new apps/*-mcp surfaces — shortest cross-backend finance combo.

combos.name: ledger-to-finance-brief
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent ChittyLedger entries for a financial namespace, reason over them with sequential-thinking to identify anomalies or trends, and write a finance brief into Notion — turning raw ledger state into an actionable narrative.
combos.notes: ledger/list_entries from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page are verified on the live gateway.

prompts.text: Pull this month's Stripe invoices and log them into my Notion finance tracker
Onboard a new Stripe customer and open a GitHub issue to track their setup
Triage my failed Stripe payments and write up a remediation plan in Notion
List all open Stripe subscriptions
Pull Stripe invoices and append each to the immutable ledger for audit
Create a billing task and lock in the intent on the ledger before it can be lost
Analyze recent ledger entries for anomalies and write a finance brief in Notion

governance.description: ChittyOS ecosystem governance, identity, evidence, and persistent state — extended with ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp), ChittyLedger (ledger-mcp), Session Coordinator (session-mcp), and ChittyEvidence canonical document store (chittyevidence). Verified-strong (2026-06-04): evidence, notion, thinking, fs live. github and orchestrator NOT connected — corrected to verified:false. New verified:true combos: evidence-reasoning-brief (evidence+thinking+notion) and rag-survey-to-file (evidence+fs).

combos.name: rag-evidence-to-notion-brief
combos.accomplishes: Discover the available AutoRAG vector stores, run an AI search across the evidence corpus, and persist the synthesized findings as a Notion brief — turning raw evidence retrieval into a governed, citable document.
combos.notes: evidence/list_rags, evidence/ai_search, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass.

combos.name: issue-triage-to-governance-tracker
combos.accomplishes: List open GitHub issues across a repo, reason over prioritization and ownership with sequential-thinking, and write the prioritized backlog into a Notion governance/tracking database.
combos.notes: github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). thinking and notion verified. Previously verified:true when github was connected.

combos.name: skill-discover-and-execute
combos.accomplishes: Find the right ChittyOS skill for a governance task, execute it through the orchestrator, then annotate the outcome as a comment on the relevant Notion page for an audit trail. Spans orchestrator + notion.
combos.notes: orchestrator/skill_search, orchestrator/skill_execute, and notion/API-create-a-comment all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass.

combos.name: context-provisioning-audit
combos.accomplishes: List TY-VY-RY scored ChittyID candidates for a session, run the autonomous provisioning evaluation, and archive the decision + per-aspect rationale into a Notion governance log.
combos.notes: orchestrator/provision_candidates, orchestrator/provision_evaluate, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass.

combos.name: agent-route-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Find which ChittyAgent handles a domain task, route the request through the orchestrator's agent protocol, and append the result to an existing Notion page's body.
combos.notes: orchestrator/agent_search, orchestrator/agent_execute, and notion/API-patch-block-children all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass.

combos.name: evidence-backed-issue
combos.accomplishes: Search the evidence corpus for prior art / supporting context, then open a GitHub issue pre-populated with the cited findings — grounding engineering work in governed evidence.
combos.notes: evidence verified. github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true.

combos.name: task-session-evidence
combos.accomplishes: Capture a governance decision as a ChittyAgent task, append it to the active session as a timestamped event, then ingest the rationale as a canonical document with a chittycanon:// URI — creating a three-layer trail: work item → session log → evidence store.
combos.notes: tasks, session, chittyevidence all in config (enabled:false). The combo models the complete governance lifecycle: intent → session context → canonical evidence.

combos.name: session-audit-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: List all active governance sessions, enumerate the events in each, reason over the event stream to identify patterns or anomalies, and render a session audit trail into Notion for human review.
combos.notes: session/list_sessions and session/list_events from apps/session-coordinator-mcp (enabled:false). thinking and notion are verified live.

combos.name: evidence-to-task-to-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Search the canonical evidence store for a governance topic, create follow-up action tasks from the findings, and append the decision to the immutable ledger — a full discover → act → record governance chain.
combos.notes: chittyevidence, tasks, ledger all in config (enabled:false). High-value three-backend governance combo: evidence informs tasks; ledger anchors the decision.

combos.name: ledger-review-to-brief
combos.accomplishes: Audit the governance ledger namespace for a topic (e.g. a session's decisions), reason over the entry stream for completeness and consistency, and produce a governance brief in Notion.
combos.notes: ledger/list_entries from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). thinking and notion are verified live.

combos.name: linear-sprint-to-governance-brief
combos.accomplishes: List active Linear projects and their completion status, reason over blockers and priorities with sequential-thinking, and write a sprint governance brief into Notion — turning engineering issue-tracker state into a governed, stakeholder-readable record.
combos.notes: linear uses mcp.linear.app/mcp (requires authTokenKey: linear-mcp). thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page are verified live.

combos.name: evidence-reasoning-brief
combos.accomplishes: AI-search the evidence corpus for a governance topic, reason over the findings with sequential-thinking to synthesize insights and flag gaps, then write a structured brief into Notion. Shortest all-verified cross-backend governance chain — three different backend domains in one intent.
combos.notes: evidence/ai_search, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass.

combos.name: rag-survey-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all available AutoRAG vector stores and save the inventory to a local file — a discovery-then-archive pattern for documenting what evidence knowledge bases exist without requiring Notion access.
combos.notes: evidence and fs both connected (2026-06-04). Minimal two-backend verified pattern; useful as a quick governance audit step.

combos.name: skill-dispatch-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Find the right ChittyOS skill for a governance task by keyword/intent, execute it through the orchestrator, and write the result to a local file as a durable audit record. A pure-orchestrator-plus-filesystem chain — no external service dependency.
combos.notes: orchestrator (skill_search, skill_execute) and fs (write_file) — all connected 2026-06-04.

combos.name: provision-evaluate-and-bind
combos.accomplishes: Evaluate which ChittyID context entity should serve a session using TY-VY-RY scoring, then execute the binding decision — the full ChittyID provisioning flow in two sequential orchestrator calls.
combos.notes: Pure orchestrator chain — provision_evaluate and provision_bind both confirmed live 2026-06-04.

combos.name: evidence-search-reason-write
combos.accomplishes: Search the AutoRAG evidence store for relevant documents, reason through the findings with sequential thinking to synthesise an analysis or audit summary, then write the final report to a file — a three-backend research-to-document chain.
combos.notes: evidence/search, thinking/sequentialthinking, and fs/write_file all confirmed on connected servers (2026-06-04 third pass).

combos.name: provision-candidates-report
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate provisioning candidates from the orchestrator, run the evaluation step to score each candidate, then write the ranked evaluation report to a file — a two-backend governance audit chain.
combos.notes: orchestrator/provision_candidates and orchestrator/provision_evaluate confirmed via live status (13 orchestrator tools connected, 2026-06-04 third pass). fs/write_file confirmed connected.

design.description: Browser rendering, automation, and desktop/visual work — extended with ChittyEvidence (chittyevidence) for canonical archival of visual artifacts, and ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp) for turning design findings into tracked work items. Verified-strong (2026-06-04): browser-rendering, playwright, fs, notion all live. github NOT connected — visual-bug-report corrected to verified:false. New combos: playwright-capture-to-notion and page-markdown-to-notion-brief (both verified:true).

combos.name: capture-archive-document
combos.accomplishes: Screenshot a live URL via Cloudflare browser-rendering, save the image to the local filesystem, then embed/reference it in a Notion page — a capture→archive→document pipeline across three backends.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot, fs/write_file, and notion/API-patch-block-children all confirmed connected (2026-06-05).

combos.name: visual-bug-report
combos.accomplishes: Drive a real browser to the failing page, capture an accessibility snapshot (better than a screenshot for actionable detail), and file a GitHub issue with the reproduction — a QA-to-engineering handoff spanning playwright + github.
combos.notes: playwright verified. github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true.

combos.name: page-to-markdown-archive
combos.accomplishes: Convert any web page to clean Markdown via browser-rendering and save it locally — a lightweight content-capture combo for design references and competitive teardowns.
combos.notes: browser-rendering and fs connected. Verified 2026-06-04.

combos.name: form-fill-and-screenshot-proof
combos.accomplishes: Automate a form submission flow end-to-end and capture a screenshot proof saved to disk — verifying a UI flow works and producing visual evidence. (playwright-heavy, but fs makes the artifact durable cross-backend.)
combos.notes: playwright and fs connected. Verified 2026-06-04.

combos.name: live-page-html-to-docs
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a live page's raw HTML, cross-reference the framework/library it uses against current docs via context7, and write an implementation note into Notion — useful for reverse-engineering a design pattern.
combos.notes: Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05). browser-rendering/get_url_html_content, context7/query-docs, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected.

combos.name: screenshot-to-canonical-evidence
combos.accomplishes: Screenshot a live URL and ingest the resulting image as a canonical evidence document with a chittycanon:// URI — making visual design artifacts governed, citable, and retrievable by future evidence searches rather than lost in a local folder.
combos.notes: browser-rendering is verified live. chittyevidence/ingest_document from apps/evidence-mcp (enabled:false pending CHITTY_EVIDENCE_TOKEN).

combos.name: browser-test-to-task
combos.accomplishes: Drive a live browser to a design target, capture an accessibility snapshot revealing the actual DOM state, and immediately create a tracked ChittyAgent task for any issues found.
combos.notes: playwright is verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). Shortest cross-backend design-to-work-tracking combo.

combos.name: playwright-capture-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a design target URL, capture a full-page screenshot, and post it as a new Notion page for team review — a three-step visual documentation pipeline driven from a single cast intent.
combos.notes: playwright/browser_navigate, playwright/browser_take_screenshot, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05).

combos.name: page-markdown-to-notion-brief
combos.accomplishes: Convert a live URL to clean Markdown via browser-rendering, reason over the content with sequential-thinking to extract key design patterns or decisions, then write the synthesized brief into Notion — deeper than a raw archive, more governed than a manual note.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05).

combos.name: screenshot-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Capture a full-page screenshot of any URL via the headless browser-rendering service, then write the image data to a local file — a minimal two-backend visual archiving chain.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot confirmed from live cast probe (2026-06-04). fs/write_file confirmed connected.

combos.name: navigate-screenshot-save
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a URL with a full Playwright browser instance (supports auth flows, JS-heavy pages), take a screenshot at the current rendered state, then persist the screenshot to disk — playwright + fs two-backend chain.
combos.notes: playwright/browser_navigate and playwright/browser_take_screenshot confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-04). fs/write_file confirmed connected.

Open the broken checkout page in a browser, snapshot it, and file a GitHub bug with the repro

code.description: Software development — source control, deployment, library documentation, database, and code quality tools. Verified-strong (2026-06-04): context7, fs, notion, evidence all live. github NOT connected — library-docs-to-github-issue corrected to verified:false. neon NOT connected — schema-branch-and-migrate, schema-to-notion-doc, db-branch-test-and-document corrected to verified:false. New verified:true combos: context7-docs-to-file, fs-survey-and-document, evidence-library-cross-ref.

combos.name: library-research-to-docs
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library name to its canonical context7 ID, fetch the current API documentation, and write a usage note into Notion — turning live library docs into a durable, searchable implementation reference.
combos.notes: Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05). context7/resolve-library-id, context7/query-docs, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected.

combos.name: schema-branch-and-migrate
combos.accomplishes: Create a Neon database branch for a schema change, apply the migration SQL, then describe the resulting table schema to confirm the change landed — a safe non-destructive schema migration workflow on a throwaway branch.
combos.notes: neon NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true. Re-enable when NEON_API_KEY is available.

combos.name: schema-to-notion-doc
combos.accomplishes: Pull the current schema for a Neon table and write it as a Notion documentation page — keeping your data-model docs in sync with the live database without manual copy-paste.
combos.notes: neon NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). notion verified. Previously verified:true.

combos.name: library-docs-to-github-issue
combos.accomplishes: Look up the latest docs for a library dependency, then open a GitHub issue pre-populated with the relevant API details — grounding an implementation task in current, accurate documentation rather than stale memory.
combos.notes: context7 verified. github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true.

combos.name: code-search-and-file-context
combos.accomplishes: Use Serena's code-intelligence search to locate a symbol or pattern across the workspace, then read the full file context around the match — a semantic-then-deep drill-down that avoids scanning files blindly.
combos.notes: serena not connected (lazy, requires token). fs/read_file verified live.

combos.name: db-branch-test-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Branch the database, run a test query or migration against the branch, then write the outcome into a Notion page — a lightweight experiment-then-document pattern for database changes.
combos.notes: neon NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). notion verified. Previously verified:true.

combos.name: workers-deploy-and-verify
combos.accomplishes: Upload a new Cloudflare Worker script and immediately fetch it back to verify the deployment landed correctly — a tight deploy→verify loop before any downstream tests run.
combos.notes: cloudflare not connected (remote endpoint, requires token). Tool names inferred from cloudflare MCP surface.

combos.name: linear-issue-to-github-pr
combos.accomplishes: List Linear issues assigned to the current sprint, then open a GitHub pull request for each — keeping issue tracking and code review in sync without manual cross-tool copy-paste.
combos.notes: linear requires authTokenKey: linear-mcp. github NOT connected (2026-06-04).

combos.name: linear-bug-to-library-context
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a Linear bug report, resolve the affected library via Context7, and load the library's API docs — giving a developer immediate reference context to reproduce and fix the issue without leaving the terminal.
combos.notes: linear inferred (auth required); context7/resolve-library-id and context7/get-library-docs verified.

combos.name: context7-docs-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library name, fetch its current API documentation, and write the result to a local file for offline reference or inclusion in a project's docs folder — a verified three-backend chain spanning docs-resolution + filesystem persistence.
combos.notes: context7 and fs both connected (2026-06-04). New combo this run. Cast: 'research library docs and save to local file' resolves to context7/resolve-library-id (score 0.31) with fs alternatives confirmed in resolution path. Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05).

combos.name: fs-survey-and-document
combos.accomplishes: List the top-level project directory contents, reason over the structure with sequential-thinking to identify architectural patterns or concerns, and write a technical architecture note into Notion — a codebase-to-doc pipeline using locally-available backends. Note: fs/list_directory covers one path at a time; enumerate subdirectories separately for deeper coverage.
combos.notes: Fixed fs/directory_tree → fs/list_directory (2026-06-05); list_directory is single-level (not recursive). fs/list_directory, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected.

combos.name: evidence-library-cross-ref
combos.accomplishes: Search the evidence corpus for prior art on a library or technology decision, then pull the current API documentation for the same library — correlating historical ChittyOS usage patterns with live upstream docs to ground implementation choices.
combos.notes: evidence and context7 both connected (2026-06-04). New combo this run — spans two different backends not previously combined in catalog. No prior evidence+context7 chain existed. Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05).

combos.name: docs-to-thinking
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library name to its Context7 ID, retrieve authoritative docs and code examples, then pass the documentation through sequential thinking to plan an integration, pick the right API, or reason through a technical decision — context7 + thinking two-backend chain.
combos.notes: context7/resolve-library-id and context7/get-library-docs confirmed via live cast probes. thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed at score 0.8 in reasoning cast (2026-06-04 third pass). Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05).

communication.description: Cross-channel messaging, notes, team communication, and follow-up task creation. Verified-strong (2026-06-04): notion and thinking connected. chittymac, imessage, and tasks are local MCP servers verified:false (not connected — require local daemon or token config). New verified:true combo: notion-reasoning-summary (notion + thinking).

combos.name: notion-note-to-task
combos.accomplishes: Search the Notion workspace for a note or meeting page, then create a ChittyAgent task from its action items — turning unstructured notes into tracked, prioritized work items without leaving the chat interface.
combos.notes: notion/API-post-search verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false pending token).

combos.name: imessage-thread-to-brief
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent messages from an iMessage thread, use sequential-thinking to identify key decisions and action items, then write a summary brief into Notion — turning an async chat thread into a durable structured record.
combos.notes: imessage not connected (requires local daemon). thinking and notion verified live.

combos.name: task-to-imessage-notification
combos.accomplishes: List open ChittyAgent tasks for a context and send a status summary as an iMessage — a pull-and-broadcast pattern for keeping stakeholders updated without a separate notification pipeline.
combos.notes: tasks from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). imessage not connected. Both are plausible per their source surfaces.

combos.name: mac-notification-and-log
combos.accomplishes: Send a macOS system notification via ChittyMac and log the event as a timestamped Notion entry — useful for workflow checkpoints where a human must be alerted and the alert itself must be auditable.
combos.notes: chittymac not connected (requires local ChittyMac daemon). notion/API-post-page verified live.

combos.name: meeting-notes-to-tasks
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a Notion meeting-notes page, reason over the content to extract discrete action items, then create a ChittyAgent task for each — automated meeting-to-action-item extraction across docs and task management.
combos.notes: notion/API-retrieve-a-page and thinking/sequentialthinking verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false).

combos.name: imessage-and-notion-broadcast
combos.accomplishes: Find the relevant Notion page for a project update, send its summary via iMessage to the stakeholders, and fire a macOS notification as a local confirmation — a three-channel broadcast from a single intent.
combos.notes: notion/API-post-search verified. imessage and chittymac not connected.

combos.name: notion-reasoning-summary
combos.accomplishes: Read a Notion meeting-notes or discussion page, reason over the content with sequential-thinking to extract key decisions, commitments, and open questions, then write a clean summary page — automated meeting distillation using only verified-live backends.
combos.notes: notion/API-retrieve-a-page, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass.

ops.description: Deployment, infrastructure monitoring, and DevOps tooling — Cloudflare Workers, database ops, source control, filesystem, and orchestration. orchestrator now connected (13 tools: skill_*/agent_*/provision_*, 2026-06-04) — stale run_job/list_jobs tool names replaced with real skill_*/agent_* equivalents. cloudflare, neon, and github not connected — combos referencing them remain verified:false. New verified:true combos added using orchestrator + fs + thinking.

combos.name: deploy-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Deploy a Cloudflare Worker to production and immediately create a Notion deployment log page — so every release is timestamped and searchable in the team's workspace.
combos.notes: cloudflare not connected at generation time. notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: worker-logs-to-incident
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent error logs from a deployed Cloudflare Worker, reason over root cause and remediation steps with sequential-thinking, then write a structured incident report into Notion.
combos.notes: cloudflare not connected. thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: db-backup-via-orchestrator
combos.accomplishes: Search the ChittyAgent skill registry for a database backup skill, then execute it through the orchestrator — dispatching the backup operation via the registered skill. Note: this combo dispatches the skill but does not perform an independent post-backup verification step.
combos.notes: orchestrator connected (2026-06-04). Replaces stale run_job/neon chain. Renamed from db-backup-and-verify: no independent verify step is included (verification is delegated to the backup skill itself). — real API uses skill_search + skill_execute. Pure orchestrator, no external deps.

combos.name: agent-incident-triage
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all ChittyAgent agents with their binding status and capabilities, reason over the agent inventory with sequential-thinking to identify gaps or anomalies in agent coverage, and write a structured inventory audit report to a local file — an ops audit of agent registration state, not a real-time health probe.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list), thinking, and fs — all connected 2026-06-04. Replaces stale list_jobs/github chain. NOTE: agent_list returns static inventory (binding/capabilities), not runtime health — describes agent registration state, not live degradation status. — real API uses agent_list.

combos.name: pr-to-deploy-pipeline
combos.accomplishes: List merged pull requests, trigger a Cloudflare Worker deploy for the release, and create a Notion deployment page linking the PR number — a three-backend deploy pipeline from a single cast intent.
combos.notes: github NOT connected (2026-06-04). cloudflare not connected. notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: infra-health-snapshot
combos.accomplishes: Pull the full ChittyAgent registry: enumerate all agents (binding status, capabilities, domains) and all available skills (triggers, execution type, descriptions) — then write a combined infrastructure health snapshot to a local file. A complete orchestrator registry dump in two API calls.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list, skill_list) and fs — all connected 2026-06-04. Replaces stale list_jobs/neon/notion chain. Pure orchestrator+fs.

combos.name: page-content-to-runbook
combos.accomplishes: Fetch public deployment documentation or runbook pages as clean Markdown and save them to a local file — a pull-and-archive pattern for keeping ops runbooks current without manual copy-paste from browser to editor.
combos.notes: browser-rendering and fs both connected (2026-06-04). New combo this run. Minimal two-backend ops pattern.

combos.name: codebase-scan-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: Walk the project directory tree, search for files matching an ops-relevant pattern (e.g. Dockerfiles, config files, worker entry points), and write the inventory into a Notion ops page — a codebase-aware ops catalog.
combos.notes: Fixed fs/directory_tree → fs/list_directory (2026-06-05). fs/list_directory, fs/search_files, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected.

combos.name: skill-search-and-run
combos.accomplishes: Discover the most relevant ChittyOS skill for an intent, execute it via the orchestrator, and persist the output to a local file — a complete search-run-record pipeline driven entirely from natural language.
combos.notes: orchestrator (skill_search, skill_execute) and fs (write_file) — all connected 2026-06-04.

combos.name: agent-inventory-to-file
combos.accomplishes: List all agents in the ChittyAgent ecosystem with their binding status, capabilities, and tool counts, then write the inventory to a local file for offline ops review or change-detection tracking.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list) and fs — both connected 2026-06-04. Simplest orchestrator+fs combo.

combos.name: page-to-runbook-via-thinking
combos.accomplishes: Fetch any URL as clean markdown (status page, incident post-mortem, deployment guide), reason through the ops implications with sequential thinking, then write the resulting runbook or action plan to a file — browser-rendering + thinking + fs three-backend chain.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown confirmed from existing verified combo page-to-markdown-archive. thinking/sequentialthinking and fs/write_file confirmed connected (2026-06-04 third pass).

prompts.text: Deploy the latest worker build to Cloudflare production and log the release in Notion
Check worker error logs and write up an incident report in Notion
Search for and execute the database backup skill via the ChittyAgent Orchestrator
List all ChittyAgent agents, triage their status, and write an incident analysis to a local file
List merged PRs, deploy the release to Cloudflare, and document it in Notion
Enumerate all ChittyAgent agents and available skills and write the orchestrator registry snapshot to a local file
List all deployed Cloudflare Workers and their last deploy date
List all available orchestrator skills and their triggers and execution types
Fetch the deployment runbook from the docs site and save it locally
Scan the codebase for worker entry points and Dockerfiles, then write an ops inventory to Notion
Search for the right orchestrator skill for this DevOps task and execute it
Pull the full agent inventory from the orchestrator and write it to a local ops file
Fetch the incident post-mortem page, reason through what went wrong, and write a runbook
